prompt: A clever, professionally designed brand logomark on a pure solid WHITE background, centered. A bold geometric capital letter 'A' where the triangular COUNTER (the negative space inside the A) is precisely shaped as a clean horizontal INFINITY symbol (∞) — a hidden-infinity monogram symbolizing 'eternal'. Refined flat vector with a subtle metallic bevel, San Marino blue (#4D6E9E) with a fine silver edge and navy depth. NOT a flame, NOT a tree, NOT a ribbon knot — a crisp letterform monogram. Distinctive, luxury, premium clinical biotech. ICON ONLY, NO wordmark, NO text.

A sophisticated architectural brand logomark on a pure solid WHITE background, centered. A capital letter 'A' formed from a single continuous MOBIUS band that twists through a half-turn so the ribbon has no beginning and no end (eternity), the apex a clean fold, the crossbar a flat band. Elegant two-tone — San Marino blue (#4D6E9E) face, near-black navy underside, thin silver fold-edge. Geometric, intentional, modern, distinctive. NOT a flame or candle shape. ICON ONLY, NO wordmark, NO text.

A premium biotech brand logomark on a pure solid WHITE background, centered. Two DNA helix strands spiral upward as twin columns and lock together at the top to form the sharp apex of a capital letter 'A', with faint horizontal base-pair rungs as the crossbar; near the bottom the two strands cross over each other to trace a small INFINITY (∞). Polished ribbon strands, San Marino blue (#4D6E9E) into navy with silver sheen. Vertical, elegant, overtly scientific and eternal, distinctive. NOT a flame/tree silhouette. ICON ONLY, NO wordmark, NO text.

A modern luxury ligature logomark on a pure solid WHITE background, centered, composed as a HORIZONTAL lockup. An elegant capital letter 'A' that shares and flows its right leg directly into a horizontal INFINITY symbol (∞) beside it, drawn as one continuous elegant stroke of even weight — a refined wordless monogram fusing 'A' and eternity. Brushed-metal look, San Marino blue (#4D6E9E) and silver on white, minimal and high-end like a fashion or watch brand mark. Distinctive, balanced. ICON ONLY, NO wordmark, NO text.

A refined emblem logomark on a pure solid WHITE background, centered. Two symmetrical laurel-like ribbon fronds sweep upward and meet to form the peak of a capital letter 'A' (classical symbol of immortality and timelessness), and where the two fronds cross at the base they form a small neat INFINITY (∞). Elegant, ceremonial yet modern, San Marino blue (#4D6E9E) with silver metallic edges and navy shadow. Distinctive and premium, NOT a flame or pine-tree shape. ICON ONLY, NO wordmark, NO text.

A striking fluid logomark on a pure solid WHITE background, centered. A capital letter 'A' formed from a single flowing stream of liquid chrome / mercury that melts at its base into a smooth INFINITY (∞) loop — organic, fluid, suggesting peptides and endless life. Glossy reflective metal tinted San Marino blue (#4D6E9E) and deep navy with bright silver highlights, soft dimension. Unexpected, artful, premium biotech. Clearly an 'A', NOT a flame or knot. ICON ONLY, NO wordmark, NO text.
